Senior Machine Learning Engineer - Search

We are hiring a Senior ML Engineer to lead search relevance work.

Responsibilities
- Own bi-encoder retrieval and cross-encoder reranking for the core search.
- Drive offline and online evaluation, including A/B testing.
- Productionize models in Python with low-latency serving on Kubernetes.

Requirements
- 4+ years building production ML systems.
- Strong Python and PyTorch, comfortable with FAISS or similar.
- Experience shipping ranking models at scale.

Nice to have
- Familiarity with feature stores and vector databases.
- Prior work on RAG or LLM-augmented retrieval.
